inputs.label: Smoking Start Age
inputs.businessContext: The age at which the individual began smoking regularly.

businessContext_i18n.en: The age at which the individual began smoking regularly.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bireyin düzenli olarak sigara içmeye başladığı yaş.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Alter, in dem die Person regelmäßig mit dem Rauchen begann.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge auquel la personne a commencé à fumer régulièrement.
businessContext_i18n.es: La edad a la que el individuo comenzó a fumar regularmente.

inputs.label: Smoking End Age (or Current Age)
inputs.businessContext: The age at which smoking ended, or the current age if still smoking.

label_i18n.fr: Âge de fin du tabagisme (ou âge actuel)
label_i18n.es: Edad de finalización del tabaquismo (o edad actual)

businessContext_i18n.en: The age at which smoking ended, or the current age if still smoking.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sigaranın bırakıldığı yaş veya hala içiliyorsa mevcut yaş.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Alter, in dem das Rauchen aufgehört wurde, oder das aktuelle Alter, falls noch geraucht wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge auquel le tabagisme a cessé, ou âge actuel si la personne fume toujours.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad en la que dejó de fumar, o la edad actual si sigue fumando.

inputs.label: Average Cigarettes per Day
inputs.businessContext: The average number of cigarettes smoked per day during the smoking period.

label_i18n.fr: Nombre moyen de cigarettes par jour

businessContext_i18n.en: The average number of cigarettes smoked per day during the smoking period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sigara içme dönemi boyunca günde içilen ortalama sigara sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die durchschnittliche Anzahl der pro Tag gerauchten Zigaretten während der Raucherphase.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre moyen de cigarettes fumées par jour pendant la période de tabagisme.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número promedio de cigarrillos fumados por día durante el período de consumo.

inputs.label: Cigarettes per Pack
inputs.businessContext: The number of cigarettes contained in a single pack, typically 20.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of cigarettes contained in a single pack, typically 20.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir pakette bulunan sigara sayısı, genellikle 20.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der Zigaretten in einer einzelnen Packung, typischerweise 20.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cigarettes dans un paquet, généralement 20.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de cigarrillos en un paquete, típicamente 20.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
